body: BSDE paid Senior Notes of GPC VI worth USD 88.91 million maturing yesterday (23/1).

body: Reduction on Indonesia's GDP growth projection this year is in line with global economic trend that is estimated to slow down compared to 2024.

body: However, interest expenses swelled quite badly (+29.25% yoy), causing net interest income to drop to IDR 40.5 trillion.

body: IDX suspends LINK's session following significant increase in cumulative prices.

body: Increased portion of export earnings parked longer domestically is believed to be able to strengthen rupiah against US dollar.
